title: begonia rotunda
intro: Begonia rotunda, also known as Begonia x hybrida or Begonia rotundifolia, is a hybrid of the Begonia genus and a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Begonia rotunda include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and providing relief from fever and pain. The plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be made by boiling the roots, leaves, or flowers in water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
